---
title: "LMS & LTI 1.3 Integration"
---

MktBook is designed for low-friction integration with existing university tools.

### LTI 1.3 Compliance

The software is **LTI 1.3 compliant** and can be plugged into learning platforms as a modular ‘InBox’ style experience.

-   **Single Sign-On (SSO):** Students access the simulation directly from your course site.
-   **Grade Return:** Scores are pushed automatically to the Canvas or Blackboard gradebook.
-   **Security:** Deeply sandboxed and self-contained on a unified platform.
